disclosures.name: Gross global Scope 1 emissions, percentage methane, percentage covered under emissions-limiting regulations
disclosures.description: Report gross global Scope 1 GHG emissions in metric tons CO2e, the percentage of Scope 1 that is methane, and the percentage of emissions covered by emissions-limiting regulations.

requiredMetrics.name: Percentage methane
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of Scope 1 emissions that is methane

requiredMetrics.name: Percentage under emissions-limiting regulations
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage covered by emissions caps or carbon pricing

disclosures.guidanceText: Report gross global Scope 1 GHG emissions, the percentage that is methane, and the percentage covered under emissions-limiting regulations or programs designed to reduce emissions.

disclosures.name: Amount of gross global Scope 1 emissions from: flared hydrocarbons, other combustion, process emissions, other vented emissions, and fugitive emissions
disclosures.description: Break down Scope 1 emissions by source: flaring, combustion, process, venting, and fugitive.

requiredMetrics.name: Other combustion emissions
requiredMetrics.description: GHG emissions from other combustion sources

disclosures.guidanceText: Break down gross global Scope 1 GHG emissions by source category. This is highly relevant for GCC oil and gas producers.

disclosures.name: Discussion of long-term and short-term strategy or plan to manage Scope 1 emissions, emissions reduction targets, and analysis of performance against those targets
disclosures.description: Discuss the strategy to manage GHG emissions and progress against reduction targets.
disclosures.guidanceText: Discuss long-term and short-term strategy to manage Scope 1 emissions, including emissions reduction targets and analysis of performance against those targets.

disclosures.name: Total fresh water withdrawn/consumed, percentage in regions with High or Extremely High Baseline Water Stress
disclosures.description: Report total fresh water withdrawn and consumed, and the percentage in water-stressed regions.

requiredMetrics.name: Percentage in high water stress
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage in High or Extremely High Water Stress regions

disclosures.guidanceText: Report total fresh water withdrawn and consumed. Report the percentage of each in regions with High or Extremely High Baseline Water Stress per WRI Aqueduct tool. All GCC operations are in extremely high water stress areas.

disclosures.name: Volume of produced water and flowback generated; percentage discharged, injected, recycled
disclosures.description: Report volume of produced water and flowback, and disposal/recycling methods.

requiredMetrics.name: Percentage injected
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage injected for disposal or enhanced recovery

disclosures.guidanceText: Report volumes of produced water generated and the percentage handled through each disposal/recycling method.

disclosures.name: Total recordable incident rate (TRIR), fatality rate, near miss frequency rate
disclosures.description: Report TRIR, fatality rate, and NMFR for full-time and contract employees.

requiredMetrics.name: TRIR (full-time employees)
requiredMetrics.description: Total Recordable Incident Rate for full-time employees

disclosures.guidanceText: Report TRIR, fatality rate, and near miss frequency rate for both full-time employees and contract employees.

disclosures.name: Sensitivity of hydrocarbon reserve levels to future price projection scenarios
disclosures.description: Report the sensitivity of proved and probable reserves to carbon pricing or demand scenarios.

requiredMetrics.name: Estimated reserves under IEA scenarios
requiredMetrics.description: Reserve estimates under different IEA scenarios

disclosures.guidanceText: Discuss the sensitivity of hydrocarbon reserve levels to future price projection scenarios that account for a price on carbon emissions.

disclosures.name: Estimated carbon dioxide emissions embedded in proved hydrocarbon reserves
disclosures.description: Report the estimated CO2 emissions embedded in proved reserves.

requiredMetrics.name: Embedded CO2 in proved reserves
requiredMetrics.description: CO2 emissions embedded in proved hydrocarbon reserves

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the estimated CO2 emissions embedded in proved hydrocarbon reserves. Relevant for stranded asset risk assessment.

disclosures.name: Description of environmental management policies and practices for active sites
disclosures.description: Describe environmental management policies and practices including biodiversity considerations.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe environmental management policies and practices for active sites, including consideration of biodiversity and protected areas.

disclosures.name: Number and aggregate volume of hydrocarbon spills, volume in Arctic, volume impacting shorelines
disclosures.description: Report the number and volume of hydrocarbon spills.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report the number and aggregate volume of hydrocarbon spills, the volume recovered, and the volume in environmentally sensitive areas.
